evals.prompt: Zeichne ein Flowchart für den Prozess: Eine Idee kommt auf → wird bewertet (gut genug?) → wenn ja: wird umgesetzt → wenn nein: wird verworfen oder verfeinert
evals.expected_output: A flowchart with start node, evaluation diamond, yes/no branches, action rectangles, and end nodes. Should use appropriate colors, readable font sizes, proper camera setup, and progressive drawing order.

assertions.text: Uses cameraUpdate as the first element
Contains a diamond element for the decision
Has yes/no branches with labeled arrows
Uses backgroundColor on shapes (not just outlines)

evals.prompt: Erstelle eine Mindmap mit dem Zentrum 'Persönliche Entwicklung' und mindestens 5 Zweigen aus diesen Bereichen: Lesen, Sport, Systemdenken, Attraktoren, Gewohnheiten
evals.expected_output: A mind map with a central 'Persönliche Entwicklung' node, radiating branches for each topic in different colors. Should have clear visual hierarchy, no overlapping elements, and use multiple camera positions or a well-sized single camera.

assertions.text: Central node is clearly identifiable and larger/bolder than branches
At least 5 branch nodes are present
Different colors are used for different branches
Arrows connect center to branches (no arrowheads needed)

evals.prompt: Zeig mir ein Architektur-Diagramm einer einfachen Web-App: Browser im Frontend, REST API in der Mitte, PostgreSQL-Datenbank im Backend. Zeige die Verbindungen und was jeweils übertragen wird.
evals.expected_output: A layered architecture diagram with 3 colored zone backgrounds (frontend/API/data), component boxes in each zone, labeled arrows showing data flow (HTTP requests, SQL queries), and a clear title.

assertions.text: Three distinct layers/zones are visually separated with background colors
Arrow labels describe what is transmitted (HTTP, SQL, etc.)
Camera is sized to show the full diagram with padding
